message:
feat(sync): cascade-aware overwrite tracking + storage acceleration_json + lint fixes

Sync import now tracks overwritten segments and events *before* deleting
the parent run during ConflictPolicy::Overwrite. New HashMaps
overwritten_segment_idxs_before and overwritten_event_seqs_before capture
pre-overwrite child IDs so that cascade deletes can be audited and
partial re-imports detected.

Storage: runs INSERT now includes acceleration_json column when the
replay_json schema extension is present. Serializes report.result.
acceleration as JSON, defaulting to "{}" when absent. This caches
per-run acceleration metadata alongside the run record.

Backend lint fixes:
- mod.rs: collapsed nested if (!binary_found + mode check) into single
  condition with && per clippy::collapsible_if
- native_audio.rs: minor adjustment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
